goal: Create plugins/file-drop-zone.js for drag-and-drop file upload overlay
sub_tasks: T1: Create IIFE skeleton with __FileDropZoneInited guard
T2: Add dragenter/dragover listeners on document to show overlay div (opacity transition, 'Drop files here' text)
T3: Add dragleave listener to hide overlay when leaving document body
T4: Add drop listener: preventDefault(), stopPropagation(), hide overlay
T5: Iterate e.dataTransfer.files, create FormData, POST /api/attachments
T6: On success: for each response, insert markdown link into msgInput.value at cursor position
T7: Support multiple files in one drop
T8: Add CSS overlay styles inline or use existing vars for overlay background/text
guard_focus: Does drop call preventDefault (prevents browser from opening file)?
Does it support multiple files at once?
Are uploaded file links inserted at cursor position?
Does dragleave properly hide overlay (consider dragleave from child elements)?
notes: ~60 lines. Very similar to image-paste but for drag-and-drop. Can reuse some logic.
